P_source.claim_boundary: Theorem-side constant provenance only; not a finite simulator-derived CMB input.

N_source.claim_boundary: Theorem-side constant provenance only; not a finite simulator-derived CMB input.

input_status.claim_boundary: Presence means the simulator emitted a finite diagnostic value. Physical-gate passage also requires the source label to be one of the hard finite CMB sources accepted by the contract, plus source-only provenance, pooled reducers, a finite covariant stress parent, and frozen source/solver/likelihood hashes. P and N are reported separately as theorem-side constants.

claim_boundary: Physical-CMB frontier report. Measurement-comparable TT curves are physical-unit outputs, but they remain diagnostic until the finite input contract, finite-source promotion gates, and official likelihood execution gates all pass.
